docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,982.00 FILED BY LOPEZ DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT PHOLLIES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-19-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF SEP-21-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO HARRY MURPHY RECEIVED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-19-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ DENISE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOLLIES INC. $2,890.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,902.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PHOLLIES INC.
